parameters.name: period_pre
parameters.override_behavior: sets the full clock period before t_switch

parameters.name: period_post
parameters.override_behavior: sets the full clock period for cycles scheduled after t_switch

parameters.name: tedge
parameters.override_behavior: sets CLK rise and fall smoothing

evaluation_summary.full_credit: valid candidate and reference pass and all five negatives killed behaviorally

modeling_constraints: Generate a deterministic supply-referenced square wave with a parameterized frequency step.
Use event-driven state and smoothed voltage contributions only.
Do not hard-code validation stop times or sample windows, and do not use current contributions, transistor-level devices, validation hooks, or simulator side channels.

properties.observable_contract: CLK low and high levels track VSS and VDD respectively.
Clock cycles before t_switch have full period period_pre.
Clock cycles scheduled after t_switch have full period period_post.
The waveform changes cadence near t_switch without stopping, duplicating, or losing clock transitions.
CLK duty cycle remains close to 50 percent on both sides of the cadence step.
Nearby legal overrides of period_pre, period_post, t_switch, and tedge produce the corresponding periods, switch boundary, and edge smoothing.

title: Reference Step Clock
